testcase.name: Browser Audio Debugging › should debug audio streaming from agent to browser
testcase.system-out: ✅ Connected to room successfully Agent participant visible: false Audio elements found: 0 WebSocket status: WebSocket available Room status: No room connection Audio tracks: 1 Agent audio status: No agent audio 📸 Screenshot saved as audio-debug.png Console status: Console available 🔍 Audio debugging complete - check the logs above for issues

testcase.name: Browser Audio Debugging › should test LiveKit room connection and audio

failure.message: browser-audio-debug.spec.ts:103:7 should test LiveKit room connection and audio

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › browser-audio-debug.spec.ts:103:7 › Browser Audio Debugging › should test LiveKit room connection and audio
TimeoutError: page.waitForSelector: Timeout 15000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('button:has-text("Disconnect")') to be visible
121 | 122 | // Wait for connection > 123 | await page.waitForSelector('button:has-text("Disconnect")', { | ^ 124 | timeout: 15000, 125 | }); 126 | at /Users/admin/dev/tmp/strella/interview-next-service/tests/browser-audio-debug.spec.ts:123:16
